_metadata.name: minimal
_metadata.description: Minimal, modern design with clean typography and spacing
_metadata.author: mdsone

_comment_toc: Enable table of contents in sidebar. levels: array of heading levels to include (e.g. [2, 3] for h2-h3). Set enabled to false to disable TOC.
_comment_assets: Place .css and .js files in the assets/ folder; they are auto-scanned, sorted by numeric prefix (e.g. 01-reset.css, 02-layout.css), and inlined into the HTML output. CDN resources can be added directly in template.html as <link> or <script> tags.
